stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"It has the blind maze that I consider clever. But, the game is too short to expand this idea. The way to return back is the same and could be something different. Also, the enemy can increase the difficulty on a way that could make it frustrating.","originality-rating":2,"originality-free-response":"The blind part is the only thing original. The maze and the enemy is a game mechanic too old. The aesthetic is something from the 2010s and the theme is a thing that can be on any phone since the creation of the smartphones. The surprise was the enemy, but rapidly became something normal and avoidable, at least on this first level.","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"The first time when you reach the relic is enjoyable, the return feels backtracking. Maybe on the return can be light to see certain parts and discover a different way to arrive the start. ","authenticity-rating":2,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":1,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It feels like a game from a JAM. Simple, with an appealing generic aesthetic and it can be done on one day with the knowledge and disposition. I did not see an intention, but maybe a short game to enjoy on free time can be an answer."}

stimulus:

response: {"creativity-rating":1,"creativity-free-response":"It seems an old atari/nes car game idea transformed into moths and space. response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"It has some interesting gameplay. The scattering button was not as fast as it could be and the following button was the only one that I understood quite well. The other factors were too slow to notice at the moment. But all this things were super creative and the levels were diverse enough to make a challenge.","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"Maybe the parts unoriginal were the asthethic. Too simple, but effective. The surprise was the levels diversity. It felt original the way the birds move and react to the factors. ","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"It was generally cool, but the speed was too slow. I lost the first time because I did not understand the shadow thing. It loses my birds but I did not know why. The rest was enjoyable, the level design, the objectives, the difficuly and the movement. ","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It was clearly a creative decision to show the bird movement in the sky. The movement was clearly thought to make it simple and understandable. It was put effort on the diverse levels and obstacles and it considered the birds group behaviour. So, it had a funny and entertaining way to represent this idea. "}
